issues.message: Indic-script text lacks a matching lang attribute

evidence.snippet: छात्रवृत्ति के लिए आवेदन की अंतिम तिथि 15 अगस्त है।
evidence.reason: Devanagari text inherits lang="en", which does not match the script, so text-to-speech reads it with the wrong voice.

issues.suggested_fix: Add a lang attribute matching the text's language (for example lang="pa" for Gurmukhi) on the element or a fitting ancestor.

rule.title: Indic-script text lacks a matching lang attribute
rule.why_it_matters: Text-to-speech picks a voice from the declared language, so Devanagari, Gurmukhi, Tamil, or other Indic-script text under a missing or non-matching lang is read as garbled English.
rule.manual_review_notes: Confirm the actual language: several languages share a script (Hindi and Marathi both use Devanagari), so the right lang value needs a human decision.
rule.static_check_limitations: Script detection uses Unicode ranges and is a heuristic. Transliterated text (Hindi written in Latin letters) cannot be detected at all.

issues.message: Indic-script text lacks a matching lang attribute

evidence.snippet: ਵਜ਼ੀਫ਼ੇ ਲਈ ਅਰਜ਼ੀ ਦੀ ਆਖਰੀ ਮਿਤੀ 15 ਅਗਸਤ ਹੈ।
evidence.reason: Gurmukhi text inherits lang="en", which does not match the script, so text-to-speech reads it with the wrong voice.

issues.suggested_fix: Add a lang attribute matching the text's language (for example lang="pa" for Gurmukhi) on the element or a fitting ancestor.

rule.title: Indic-script text lacks a matching lang attribute
rule.why_it_matters: Text-to-speech picks a voice from the declared language, so Devanagari, Gurmukhi, Tamil, or other Indic-script text under a missing or non-matching lang is read as garbled English.
rule.manual_review_notes: Confirm the actual language: several languages share a script (Hindi and Marathi both use Devanagari), so the right lang value needs a human decision.
rule.static_check_limitations: Script detection uses Unicode ranges and is a heuristic. Transliterated text (Hindi written in Latin letters) cannot be detected at all.

issues.message: Declared lang contradicts the text's script

evidence.snippet: आवेदन पत्र स्कूल कार्यालय से प्राप्त करें।
evidence.reason: The element declares lang="ta" but its text is dominantly Devanagari script, so a screen reader picks the wrong voice.

issues.suggested_fix: Correct the lang attribute to match the language actually written in the element.

rule.title: Declared lang contradicts the text's script
rule.why_it_matters: A lang attribute promising one language over text written in a different script makes screen readers pick the wrong voice, which is worse than no declaration at all.
rule.manual_review_notes: Languages sharing a script cannot be told apart here; the check only fires when the script itself contradicts the declaration.
rule.static_check_limitations: Script detection uses Unicode ranges and cannot judge transliterated or romanized text.

issues.message: Latin and Indic scripts mix without a lang boundary

evidence.snippet: Please bring your income certificate क्योंकि यह आवेदन के लिए आवश्यक है।
evidence.reason: One text node mixes Devanagari text with 5 Latin words and no lang-tagged boundary, which commonly garbles text-to-speech.

issues.suggested_fix: Wrap each language's text in an element with the matching lang attribute so speech engines can switch voices.

rule.title: Latin and Indic scripts mix without a lang boundary
rule.why_it_matters: When one text run mixes scripts without lang-tagged boundaries, speech engines cannot switch voices and commonly garble one of the languages.
rule.manual_review_notes: Short mixes are often fine; the check already ignores numbers, short acronyms, and single loanwords, but listen with a real screen reader to confirm impact.
rule.static_check_limitations: A conservative heuristic: it requires several Latin words next to Indic text in one text node and may miss subtler mixes or flag intentional bilingual lines.

limitations: This prototype only runs static HTML checks.
It does not replace a full human accessibility audit.
It does not yet perform browser-based interaction testing.
